event.summary: Accepted the unit after passing validation and instruction synchronization.

acceptance.proof: One infallible dependency-free composition moves an accepted ShortInfoQueryWire beside one caller-selected DocumentedDiscoveryDestination and exposes the documented port without altering either value.
Borrowed and consuming access preserve the query wire allocation, exact bytes, destination spelling, presentation fact, and documented port.
The type is explicitly a local proposal and owns no address validity, destination policy, socket, send, interface, discovery runtime, reachability, currentness, or interoperability authority.

No sockets, interface enumeration, multicast joins, broadcast sends, endpoint selection policy, retries, clocks, currentness, reachability/interoperability claims, runtime activation, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, devices, private artifacts, or Manifold authority are added.

document.commit_policy: Commit proposal composition separately from lifecycle acceptance and push preparation.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the inert LSLC-002K proposal composition and runtime exclusions.
Synchronize public proposal and non-scope prose.
Reviewed public/private routing; no shared-skill mutation expected.
Reviewed proposal/activation and authority boundaries; no shared-skill mutation expected.

non_scope: Address parsing, validation, normalization, correction, classification, binary representation, destination expansion, deduplication, iteration policy, selection policy, or endpoint semantics.
Sockets, sends, interface enumeration, multicast joins, broadcast configuration, discovery runtime, retries, clocks, currentness, reachability, interoperability, response collection, or activation.
Dependencies, features, unsafe, FFI, devices, private artifacts, black-box observation, or Manifold authority.
document.objective: Compose one caller-selected accepted LSLC-002J documented destination with one accepted LSLC-002D short-info query wire value into an allocation-preserving local proposal, without acquiring any address, selection, networking, discovery-runtime, or authority behavior.
outputs: Inert Rust proposal composition with borrowed and consuming access.
Public routing/architecture/validation documentation, Standard receipt, and exact-ID executed no-force feature-push receipt.
